meaning: adj.离奇有趣的,奇怪的,做得很精巧的
examples: This quaint custom should be revived.
It is a quaint and marvellous thought!
Lord, how marvellous a thing it is, the grip his memory doth take upon his quaint and crazy fancies!
The two best rooms have private balconies overlooking the quaint, pedestrianised tourist strip of Duolun Road.
It would make the last few months of government intervention in Wall Street look quaint.
